nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 圣马丁大区

nodes.name: 北桑坦德省

nodes.name: 线纹蚁鵙

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: berlepschi is found from southern Zamora-Chinchipe into northeastern Peru's departments of Amazonas, Cajamarca, and San Martín. The lined antshrike primarily inhabits the edges of humid evergreen forest and secondary forest, where it favors areas heavy with shrubs and other undergrowth

links.label: 受威胁于

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Tree cover loss is however currently slow, and due to its low sensitivity to habitat disturbance the species is not thought to be negatively affected." It is considered fairly common in Colombia, fairly numerous in Ecuador, and fairly common in Peru
